emiratesid.ae.publicdata
Class PublicDataFacade

java.lang.Object
  emiratesid.ae.publicdata.PublicDataFacade

public class PublicDataFacade
extends java.lang.Object

Copyright (c) 2010 LOGICA. All Rights Reserved.
Public Data Interface used to extract card holder public data and check card genuine

Since:
1.6
Version:
2.0
Author:
Hakim SEBSSI

Constructor Summary
PublicDataFacade(PCSCReader reader)
          Initialize PublicDataFacade with a valid PCSCReader object
 
Method Summary
 boolean getCardGenuine()
           
 boolean isCardGenuine()
          Check if the current smart card is Genuine UAE card This method authenticate the card with local SAM
 CardHolderPublicData readPublicData(boolean refresh, boolean ReadPhotography, boolean ReadNonModifiableData, boolean ReadModifiableData, boolean SignatureValidation)
          Read card holder public data
 
Methods inherited from class java.lang.Object
equals, getClass, hashCode, notify, notifyAll, toString, wait, wait, wait
 

Constructor Detail

PublicDataFacade

public PublicDataFacade(PCSCReader reader)
Initialize PublicDataFacade with a valid PCSCReader object

Parameters:
reader - A valid connected PCSCReader object
Method Detail

readPublicData

public CardHolderPublicData readPublicData(boolean refresh,
                                           boolean ReadPhotography,
                                           boolean ReadNonModifiableData,
                                           boolean ReadModifiableData,
                                           boolean SignatureValidation)
                                    throws MiddlewareException
Read card holder public data

Parameters:
refresh - if false the cached data are returned, otherwise this function will fetch the data from the card
ReadPhotography - if true the photography is retrieved
ReadNonModifiableData - if true the card holder non modifiable data are retrieved
ReadModifiableData - if trie the card holder modifiable data are retrieved
SignatureValidation - if true the Technical Root Certificate is retrieved, public data are validated internally by the kernel
Returns:
Card Holder Public Data object
Throws:
MiddlewareException

getCardGenuine

public boolean getCardGenuine()

isCardGenuine

public boolean isCardGenuine()
                      throws MiddlewareException
Check if the current smart card is Genuine UAE card This method authenticate the card with local SAM

Returns:
true if genuine
Throws:
MiddlewareException
